Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = 15 Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Tabela Preco Produto' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &ActionSelecione.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionColumn' &Imagem.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' ProGraBar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProNomGra.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' NcmCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' MarNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraEstLoc.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraEstSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProPesLiqPrd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &Imagem = !'' &VolumeEmbalagem = 'EMB:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdEmb)) + ' / VOL:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdVol)) If ProCod <> ProEstProCod &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoFirstColumn' &Imagem.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraBar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraRef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProNomGra.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' NcmCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' MarNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraEstLoc.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraEstSdo.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProPesLiqPrd.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' Else &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = 'WWActionColumn' &Imagem.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' ProGraBar.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' ProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') ProNomGra.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' NcmCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' MarNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc1.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc2.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc7.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc8.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TabPrc9.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' ProGraEstLoc.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' ProGraEstSdo.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstSdo <= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') ProPesLiqPrd.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VolumeEmbalagem.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoParcelamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPDF' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoColunas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProBar1.Visible = False &TabPrc11.Visible = False &ProDtaCad1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc11.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProBar2.Visible = False &TabPrc12.Visible = False &ProDtaCad2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc12.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProBar3.Visible = False &TabPrc13.Visible = False &ProDtaCad3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' &TabPrc13.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAREF" &ProGraRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAESTSDO" &ProGraEstSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABULTALT" &TabUltAlt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROISGRA" &ProIsGra.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &TabPrc11.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' &ProDtaCad1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAREF", "", not &ProGraRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAESTSDO", "", not &ProGraEstSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraEstSdo, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABULTALT", "", not &TabUltAlt.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabUltAlt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROISGRA", "", not &ProIsGra.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProIsGra.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc11.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc11.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc12.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc12.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'TABPRC1' AND not &TabPrc13.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &TabPrc13.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRODTACAD' AND not &ProDtaCad3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProDtaCad3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TabelaPrecoProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
